Who We Are

Renewal by Andersen: Crafted for Long Beach Living

Renewal by Andersen of Greater Los Angeles - Laguna Hills started with a simple mission: to provide Long Beach homeowners with superior window replacement services built for the local environment. We understand the unique challenges our coastal climate poses, from intense sun exposure to the occasional Santa Ana winds. That's why we've dedicated ourselves to offering durable, energy-efficient windows designed to withstand the test of time.

Our approach is rooted in quality craftsmanship and personalized service. We don't believe in one-size-fits-all solutions. Our team takes the time to assess your specific needs, considering everything from your home's architectural style to your energy efficiency goals. We then tailor a window replacement plan that maximizes both performance and aesthetic appeal.

As a local business, we are deeply committed to the Long Beach community. We strive to minimize our environmental impact through responsible disposal and recycling practices. We also actively support local initiatives aimed at preserving our city's unique character and enhancing the quality of life for all residents.

12+ Years
800+ Projects
97% Satisfaction

Our Difference

Why Choose Renewal by Andersen of Greater Los Angeles - Laguna Hills

Local Expertise

We understand Long Beach homes and climate, offering tailored window solutions.

Superior Durability

Our windows are built to withstand intense sun, salty air, and seismic activity.

Energy Efficiency

Reduce energy bills and improve comfort with our energy-efficient window options.

Professional Installation

Expert installers ensure a perfect fit and lasting performance for your new windows.

Upgrade Your Long Beach Home Today

Schedule a free consultation and discover the Renewal by Andersen difference.

Client Feedback

What Our Clients Say

“

We replaced all the windows in our 1930s Craftsman in Belmont Heights. The team was meticulous in preserving the character of the house while upgrading to energy-efficient windows. The difference in noise reduction from Ocean Blvd is incredible!

Maria G. Window Replacement
“

The casement windows in our kitchen look fantastic! The installation was quick and professional. We had a minor issue with one window, but they came back promptly and fixed it without any hassle.

Robert K. Casement Window Installation
“

We replaced our old, drafty double-hung windows with Renewal by Andersen. The new windows are beautiful and have made a huge difference in our energy bills. The team was courteous and cleaned up everything perfectly.

Susan L. Double-Hung Window Replacement
“

We added a bay window in our living room, and it completely transformed the space! The design team helped us choose the perfect style to match our home, and the installation was flawless. We love the extra light and the expanded view.

David M. Bay Window Installation
“

We replaced our old sliding glass door with a Renewal by Andersen sliding window. The new window is much easier to open and close, and it looks great! The only reason I didn't give 5 stars is that the installation took a little longer than expected.

Jennifer P. Sliding Window Replacement
“

We installed a large picture window in our dining room to take advantage of the view of the Pacific. The window is stunning! It's like having a piece of art in our home. The installation team was professional and efficient.

Michael S. Picture Window Installation

Our Portfolio

Our Recent Work

Common Questions

Frequently Asked Questions

How long does window replacement take?
The duration of a window replacement project depends on the number of windows being replaced and the complexity of the installation. Most projects can be completed in one to two days.
What types of windows do you offer?
We offer a wide variety of window styles, including double-hung, casement, awning, sliding, picture, and specialty windows. We also offer a range of materials, including Fibrex® composite, wood, and vinyl.
Do you offer financing options?
Yes, we offer flexible financing options to help make your window replacement project more affordable. Contact us to learn more about our financing programs.
